revision: v2 (post re-probe + primary-source pass; STAGED — not yet accepted by runner due to write-once gate)
interviewSummary: Phase 0 discovery for Captains Fish and Chicken, a counter-service soul-food / fried-fish restaurant at 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids IA 52402 (owner Ray Aqel, opened Oct 2024). NAP and hours corroborated across Yelp, Uber Eats, DoorDash, Grubhub, Postmates and local press (Cedar Rapids Gazette, KHAK). v2 adds a primary-source pass and a trust re-probe: the Cedar Rapids Gazette confirms both opening dates, states the owner has managed restaurants since 2006, and gives menu specifics (cornmeal breading with fresh-ground lemon pepper; fried catfish as the most popular item; sides include mashed potatoes and mac & cheese; proteins include liver). The trust re-probe did NOT reach six hard credential facts: Yelp shows 5.0 but on only 1 review, Facebook shows 100% recommend across 17 reviews, the Yelp 'health score 98' is a Yelp estimate (not an official inspection), and no awards exist — so the trust grid stays OMITTED (honest, not padded). Hours-source variance noted honestly (see hoursSourceVariance): one earlier aggregator source listed only Mon-Thu and Fri; the fuller source and the brief agree on Sun 11-8 / Mon-Thu 11-10 / Fri-Sat 11-11, and no source contradicted the brief. The real second location (3100 6th St SW, opened May 16 2025) is owner-confirmed but scoped OUT; site is 1616 only. Conversion-surface gaps unchanged and load-bearing: no lead-form endpoint/email (lead form cannot ship), phone is voice-only (dual-CTA call-only), and no analytics configured. Google Business Profile could not be located via web search and is handed to Phase 1.

userConfirmedFacts.fact: Name: Captains Fish and Chicken (legal entity: Captains Fish and Chicken, INC)
In-scope address: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
Phone: (319) 221-1040 — regular voice line, NOT SMS/text-capable
Owner: Ray Aqel
Opened October 2024 (soft opening late Oct 2024)
Hours: Sun 11:00-20:00; Mon-Thu 11:00-22:00; Fri-Sat 11:00-23:00 (web matches brief; see hoursSourceVariance)
Counter-service model; primarily takeout / to-go
Owner opened and sold the same concept in Minnesota, Illinois, and Michigan before Iowa; first Iowa location

Menu items accurate (owner-confirmed set): chicken (fried chicken, tenders, boneless wings, bone-in wings, gizzards); seafood (perch, tilapia, catfish, cod, calamari, crab cakes, shrimp); sides (okra, hush puppies, onion rings, breaded mushrooms, fries, cheese curds); dessert (chocolate cake)
Everything made fresh to order; restaurant recommends calling ahead for faster service
Second location at 3100 6th St SW is real (opened May 2025) but OUT OF SCOPE; site is 1616 only
No catering offered
userConfirmedFacts.source: owner (corrects web/Yelp implication); Gazette also mentions none

userConfirmedFacts.fact: No halal or dietary claims
No current promotions or specials
Brand colors: navy #0a3a5c and gold #f2a516; no logo yet (create); no professional photos
Three value props: made fresh to order; does both fish and chicken right; family-owned
Mid-page CTA banner line: 'Call ahead — your order's hot when you arrive.'
Online ordering happens via third-party delivery apps (DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub, Postmates); these are CTAs, not owned pages
No Google Ads; no Google Analytics configured
No domain and no hosting chosen yet
